title: Leftover Turkey Tortilla Soup (a.k.a. the pink soup)
ingredients: 2 cans diced tomatoes with green chiles (10.5 oz)
4 cups cooked turkey or chicken, shredded or cubed
1 cup heavy cream (can substitute with half and half)
1 can black beans (15 oz), drained and rinsed
instructions: Heat oil in large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Sauté onions and garlic until softened.
Add tortilla pieces and cook briefly.
Add tomatoes, broth, and spices; bring to a boil.
Remove from heat and let stand 5 minutes.
Puree soup in batches until smooth.
Bring to near boiling, then simmer until slightly thickened.
Reduce heat, add cheese, and stir until melted.
Add lime juice and season to taste with salt and pepper.
Make black bean salsa by combining drained black beans, diced tomatoes, diced red onion, cilantro, jalapeño, lime juice, and olive oil; season with salt and pepper.
Serve soup topped with black bean salsa and sour cream (optional).
notes: This soup is also called 'the pink soup'
Heavy cream can be substituted with half and half
Cayenne pepper can be adjusted to taste
Black bean salsa is optional but recommended as a topping
Sour cream is an optional garnish
